description: F3-B: the day-one sentence verbatim — open and blocked tasks covered, conditions phrased, nothing settled shown (decision 0013 ruling 7).

facts.content: You will send Luka the revised offer after Luka confirms the budget.
You will send Ana the Atlas risk register.
The quarterly report was delivered to Vera last week.

script: What did I decide, promise, and commit to — across my email, calendar, and notes — and what's still open?
